data.name: In Your Shoes: An NSFW MILF & Daughter Sex VN
data.detailed_description:
This Adult VN is designed to be a chill, relaxing experience that you can enjoy with NO grinding, and without a walkthrough.
It is a linear experience, so you can just relax and you won't miss a single scene, even if you only play it through once!
Don't worry when picking dialog responses, you'll get to experience everything on your first playthrough.

If you're looking for a grind, multiple paths accessible through obscure choices, and other headaches, this is NOT the VN for you.


The Story

After signing a pact with the devil, you find yourself in the shoes of a man who just survived a failed suicide attempt, and are given the mission to save his life from any further attempt.

Seduce Norah, the lonely MILF

You will run into Norah, an attractive mature woman who will help you rebuild your life from scratch, hiring you to work on her farm.


Meet Remi, the sexy daughter

Norah lives with her beautiful adult daughter Remi. Not used to having a man around, she will take an interest in you...


Face their rival

Help Norah and Remi protect their farm against their sexy rival, and uncover their secrets...

data.short_description: Seduce a sexy mother and daughter, as well as their sexy rival.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 法文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6-10.14
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Game is non-notarized. May not work with 10.15 Catalina

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu / SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
